description: Valid lifecycle state transitions for governed artifacts. Any transition not listed here is rejected by the lifecycle enforcer.

transitions.description: Input artifact validated and processed by a governed engine.
Transformed artifact submitted for evaluation against governed criteria.
Evaluation found issues requiring follow-up. action_required=true and work item must exist.
Evaluation found no issues. action_required=false and rationale documented.
Work item accepted and active remediation has begun.
Remediation completed. Work item resolved with resolution notes.
Resolved artifact submitted for re-evaluation to confirm remediation.
Re-evaluation found remaining or new issues. New work item required.
Re-evaluation confirmed resolution. Artifact lifecycle complete.
